case_title: MAJOR ASSOCIATES VS LAW OFFICE OF EUGENE HANNON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICE OF EUGENE HANNON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $212.78 FILED BY MAJOR  ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT LAW OFFICE OF EUGENE HANNON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAJOR  ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAW OFFICE OF EUGENE HANNON $212.78 PRINCIPAL, $58.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $270.78 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO LAW OFFICE OF EUGEN HANNON RETURNED FORWARDING TIME EXPIRED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-14-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUN-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
